home.heroSubtitle: One-click, end-to-end care: discovery, availability, telehealth, health tourism and secure communication.
home.coreBox1Desc: Professional Reviews provide expert opinions on clinics/hospitals and their facilities with photos, videos, and materials to help you make the best decision about your treatment.
home.coreBox2Desc: With Medstream, follow your favorite clinics, receive their latest updates, and engage with posts. Get personalized updates from clinics in your preferred region and specialization.
home.coreBox3Desc: World-first artificial intelligence that provides symptom analysis and processes treatment requests, matching you with qualified doctors in your chosen location for your medical needs.
home.coreBox4Desc: Arrange your complete medical journey with one click - flights, accommodation, transport, and treatment - with transparent total pricing.
home.coreBox5Title: Telehealth and Messaging with Real-Time Translation
home.coreBox5Desc: Communicate with your doctor or patients instantly online in your native language. No more language barriers through real-time translation technology.
home.coreBox6Desc: Complete clinic/hospital management system with specialized access levels for different staff roles, seamlessly integrating your medical tourism and regular operations.

kvkk.title: KVKK Disclosure Text
kvkk.subtitle: Law No. 6698 on Protection of Personal Data
kvkk.summary_text: At MedGama, we take all necessary technical and administrative measures to protect your personal data in accordance with Law No. 6698 (KVKK) and related legislation. This disclosure text transparently explains how your data is processed.
kvkk.s1_content: MedGama Health Technologies Inc. ("MedGama") processes your personal data as the data controller within the scope of the Law No. 6698 on Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK"). MedGama attaches great importance to the security of your personal data and takes all technical and administrative measures.
kvkk.s2_content: Your personal data is processed for the purposes of providing health services, appointment management, telehealth services, patient-doctor communication, billing and payment transactions, fulfilling legal obligations, improving service quality, and statistical analysis.
kvkk.s3_title: 3. Legal Reasons for Processing Personal Data
kvkk.s3_content: Your personal data is processed based on the legal reasons specified in Articles 5 and 6 of KVKK: your explicit consent, performance of a contract, legal obligation, establishment/exercise/protection of a right, and legitimate interest. Your special category personal data (health data) is processed only with your explicit consent or for the purpose of protecting public health.
kvkk.s4_content: Your personal data may be shared with service providers, business partners, legal authorities, and authorized public institutions and organizations in accordance with the conditions specified in Articles 8 and 9 of KVKK. Data transfer abroad is carried out to countries with adequate protection or with your explicit consent.
kvkk.s5_content: Your personal data is retained for the duration required by the processing purposes and within the scope of legal retention obligations. Health data is retained for at least 10 years due to legal obligation, financial records for 5 years, and account data for 3 years from account closure.
kvkk.s6_content: Pursuant to Article 11 of KVKK, you have the right to: learn whether your personal data is processed, request information if processed, learn the purpose of processing and whether they are used in accordance with the purpose, know the third parties to whom personal data is transferred, request correction if processed incompletely or incorrectly, request deletion or destruction, request notification of corrections/deletions to third parties, object to any result that arises against you through analysis of processed data exclusively by automatic systems, and claim compensation for damages arising from unlawful processing.
kvkk.s7_content: To exercise the rights mentioned above, you can send an email to kvkk@medgama.com or visit the "Data Rights" page on our platform. Your applications will be responded to free of charge within 30 days at the latest.
